name: Brandy [Lastname]
summary: Results-driven operations professional with 8+ years of experience supporting high-volume business environments, optimizing workflows, and improving team performance. Proven ability to analyze data, build scalable processes, and develop training systems that enhance productivity and operational efficiency.

experience.title: Operations Specialist / Senior Agent Support
bullets: Analyzed and organized operational data to track agent performance, pipeline health, and business outcomes
Built and maintained agent pipelines, improving visibility into workflow and increasing efficiency across teams
Conducted internal audits to ensure compliance, accuracy, and process consistency
Developed templates, SOPs, and training manuals to standardize onboarding and daily operations
Led training sessions and supported new team members, reducing onboarding friction and improving ramp-up time
Managed high-volume customer interactions across phone, virtual, and in-person channels while maintaining strong satisfaction
Facilitated and led Zoom meetings, driving team alignment and effective communication in remote environments
Collaborated with leadership to identify workflow inefficiencies and implement process improvements
Maintained productivity and performance in a fast-paced, high-demand environment with competing priorities

additional_experience.title: Team Collaboration & Technical Training
additional_experience.description: Full-stack engineering certification program with emphasis on collaboration and agile workflows
